title: Double Dragon 20-Pack A4 C4 Manilla Hard Board Backed Envelopes | 324mm x 229mm | 'Please Do Not Bend' Printed | Padded & Tamper-Proof | Self-Seal Closure
features: ✅ PERFECT A4 FIT & PROFESSIONAL LOOK: A4 Manilla Hard Board Backed Envelopes (324mm x 229mm), designed to hold A4 documents, certificates, photo prints, invitations, and cards without folding. Pre-printed with "Please Do Not Bend" for careful handling and a professional finish. Comes in a value pack of 20.

✅ RIGID HARD BOARD PROTECTION: Constructed with a 120gsm kraft paper front and 1000 micron hard board back, these envelopes prevent bending and creases, keeping your documents, photos, and artwork safe and intact during shipping.
✅ STRONG & SECURE SELF-SEAL CLOSURE: Features a 10mm wide, high-quality self-adhesive strip for quick, tamper-proof sealing — no need for tape or glue, keeping your contents safe and secure.
✅ LIGHTWEIGHT & COST-EFFECTIVE: Sturdy yet lightweight design helps save on postage costs. Easily write addresses directly on the envelope or attach sticky labels as needed.
✅ ECO-FRIENDLY & SUSTAINABLE: Made from 100% recycled, biodegradable, and plastic-free materials — an environmentally conscious choice for both businesses and personal use.
description: The Double Dragon A4 Hard Board Backed Envelopes offer superior protection for your important documents, photos, and certificates. Designed to fit A4-sized items without folding, these envelopes feature a rigid hard board backing to prevent bending or damage during transit. The secure peel-and-seal closure ensures tamper-proof security, while the eco-friendly, recyclable material makes them a responsible choice for businesses and individuals. Perfect for mailing legal documents, artwork, invitations, and magazines, this 20-pack provides a durable and professional mailing solution. Whether for office use, business shipments, or personal needs, these sturdy envelopes keep your contents safe and intact.
